title: The Point of No Return
summary: The heroes travel the Xala-Cermau hyperlane into Wild Space to assault Inquisitor Draco's stronghold on Xala. Master Denia is held there — if she survived. The rescue attempt ends in sacrifice, and the heroes leave the edge of known space carrying the cost. This adventure is structurally optional — players who choose not to pursue Denia proceed directly to the finale, but without whatever advantage Xala would have provided.

marks.label: Beyond the Charts
marks.desc: Travel the Xala-Cermau hyperlane into Wild Space. Past here, the galaxy ends.

marks.label: The Stronghold
marks.desc: Locate and infiltrate Draco's fortress on Xala.

marks.label: The Rescue
marks.desc: Find Denia — if she survived. What's left of her may not be what you remember.

marks.label: The Inquisitor
marks.desc: Confront Draco on his own ground. This is where it ends between you.

marks.label: The Cost
marks.desc: Someone pays the price. The rescue attempt demands sacrifice.

marks.label: Carrying It Home
marks.desc: Leave the edge of known space. What you bring back changes the final fight.

marks.label: The Crucible
marks.desc: The plan catastrophically fails. Improvise under fire to survive.

gearNotes.reason: Final preparations before the climax. Stock up — there is no resupply after this point.
Forging alliances requires secure channels. The Empire is actively hunting the heroes by this point.
Stock consumables before the finale. This is Varth's last shopping trip — buy everything.
Consumable. Stock multiples before the Leviathan assault. Once they are inside, every terminal bypass counts.
Stock ordnance for the final assault. This is the last resupply opportunity.
The Leviathan is an Imperial superweapon project — expect heavy droid and automated defenses. Stock up.
Tactical consumable for the finale. Buy in quantity.
Replace any used rope. The Leviathan's interior may require vertical movement or emergency escape routes.
